turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hey, uh, hi, I'm

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopaedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: part of pretty good AI.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Am I speaking with Paul?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, this is Paul. I’m calling to set up an appointment.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please provide your date of birth.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it’s February 15th, 1988.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks, Bob.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: what brings you in today.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Are you looking for a general office visit, a follow-up, or something else?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, I'm looking to set up a follow-up.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Just to confirm, you'd like to book a follow-up consultation, is that correct?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, exactly. That’s what I need.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Do you have a specific provider you'd like to see, or are you open to the first available?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I’d go with first available, yeah.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: We have a follow-up appointment available with Doogie Howser on Tuesday, June 30th at 4 p.m.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to book that slot or would you prefer to hear about other days?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Actually, I was hoping for something a week from this coming Thursday. What do you have around then?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Here are some options for Thursday, July 9th with Doogie Hauser, 8am, 9am, or 10am.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Do any of those work for you?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Let me think. Actually, can we go with 9 a.m. on that day?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Take your time.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Let me know which time works best or if you want to hear more options.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, let’s lock in that 9 a.m. on July 9th. That works for me.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Your appointment is set for Thursday, July 9th at 9 a.m. with Dr. Dudley Hauser at Pivot Point Orthopedic.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please bring your photo ID, insurance card, a list of your current medications, and any imaging discs you have.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Actually, wait—could we double-check something? I was also thinking maybe eight days from today. What would that date be?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Eight days from today is Tuesday, July 7th.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to see what appointments are available on that day instead?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that’d be great. What times do you have open on July 7th?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Paul, you already have an appointment on Tuesday, July 7th at 10 a.m. with Dr. Kelly Noble.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to keep that appointment, reschedule it, or look for a different time or provider?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, I didn’t realize that. Let’s keep the July 7th at 10 a.m. then. That works.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You already have an appointment on July 7th at 10 a.m.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to keep that one?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: or stick with the July 9th at 9 a.m.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Let’s keep the July 7th at 10 a.m. That’s good.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You're all set for Tuesday, July 7th at 10 a.m. with Dr. Kelly Noble.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If you need to make any changes or have other questions, just let me know.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: All right, sounds good. Thanks for your help.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Glad I could help

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Have a great day, Paul!

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Thanks, you too. Take care.
